name: ResMan Property Management API
what_it_does: ResMan Property Management REST API for multifamily, affordable housing, and student housing property management. Enables AI agents to manage lease and tenant record management for multifamily operations automation, handle rental application processing and screening for leasing workflow, access rent collection and payment processing for accounts receivable automation, retrieve maintenance request management for operations workflow, manage HUD/LIHTC affordable housing compliance for regulatory reporting, handle lease renewal and pricing optimization for revenue management, access prospect and lead management for leasing velocity, retrieve financial reporting and general ledger for property accounting, manage move-in and move-out inspection workflow for tenant lifecycle, and integrate ResMan with CRM, screening, and payment platforms.
use_cases: Processing rental applications from leasing agents
Managing HUD compliance from affordable housing agents
Collecting rent from accounts receivable agents
Handling maintenance requests from operations agents
not_for: Commercial real estate without multifamily residential focus
Short-term rental without long-term lease management
Single-family rental at small scale without software
best_when: A multifamily property management company using ResMan wants AI agents to automate leasing, rent collection, maintenance management, affordable housing compliance, and financial reporting.
avoid_when: FAIR HOUSING ACT: Automated tenant screening and application decisions must not use protected class information (race, color, national origin, religion, sex, familial status, disability); automated screening algorithms require fair housing disparate impact testing. LIHTC/HUD affordable housing compliance — automated income qualification and rent calculation for LIHTC (Low-Income Housing Tax Credit) and Section 8 must be 100% accurate; automated compliance errors create HUD/state housing finance agency audit findings and tax credit recapture risk. SCRA military tenant protections — automated lease termination for military tenants must comply with SCRA protections (right to terminate lease upon deployment orders); automated non-renewal without SCRA check creates federal violation.

auth.notes: ResMan uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Plano, Texas HQ. Founded 2009. Private (Thoma Bravo acquired majority stake 2019). 500,000+ multifamily units managed on platform. Affordable housing and student housing specialty. Competes with Entrata, Yardi, and AppFolio for multifamily PMS.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-unit monthly subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-unit monthly subscription; affordable housing module pricing
pricing.notes: Plano, Texas. Founded 2009. Thoma Bravo-backed. 500K+ multifamily units. Affordable housing specialty. Competes with Entrata and Yardi for PMS.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per integration

known_agent_gotchas: FAIR HOUSING ACT: Automated tenant screening must avoid protected class discrimination; automated screening algorithms must be tested for disparate impact on race, color, national origin, religion, sex, familial status, and disability

LIHTC affordable housing accuracy — automated income qualification and LIHTC rent limits must be 100% accurate; errors in automated affordable housing compliance create HUD audit findings and state housing finance agency tax credit recapture risk

SCRA military tenant protections — automated lease non-renewal or eviction workflows must check military service status; SCRA protects active duty military from lease termination without proper notice and legal process

HUD Section 8 HAP contract automation — automated Housing Assistance Payment (HAP) processing for Section 8 voucher tenants requires HUD compliance; automated HAP reporting errors create HCV program eligibility risk

FCRA tenant screening compliance — automated credit and background check integration requires FCRA adverse action notice compliance; automated screening decisions without FCRA adverse action notice create federal compliance risk
Rent payment data PCI scope — automated rent collection integration with payment processors must assess PCI DSS scope; tokenized payment data handling must comply with PCI requirements
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Tenant, lease, and payment data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property management. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Tenant and lease data.
